title: daphne rehderi subsp. techinensis
intro: Daphne rehderi subsp. techinensis, also known as the Chinese daphne, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of colds, fever, and inflammation due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Daphne rehderi subsp. techinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity and side effects.
